context.usage: Short-lived particle spawned near Echo; drifts upward by 8px and fades.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x8px (4 frames × 8x8) with 0px spacing.
Every frame contains at least 4 opaque pixels for readability.
Uses only the listed colors and transparency; no gradients or anti-aliasing.

reference_images.label: echo_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Cockatiel body proportion, crest, cheek patch, and state silhouette anchor.

reference_images.label: behavior_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Echo state machine timing, animation counts, and trigger anchor.

reference_images.label: relationship_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Bond progression label, unlock pacing, and relationship feedback anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle for obstacles asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/note_particle_4f.png through AssetServer and store the handle under note_particle_4f.
runtime_notes: Spawn care props and particles as separate entities so feed, clean, and pet logic can toggle visibility without atlas mutation.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
